name: New Mexico Pinto Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 hambone or 1/4 lb Salt pork or cubed bacon
1 tsp Salt, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pick over the beans, removing loose skins or shriveled beans.
2. Place in a large covered pot and cover with hot water.
3. Soak overnight if desired to reduce cooking time.
4. When the beans begin to simmer, add the ham bone, salt pork, or bacon.
5. Add more water as needed, but only use hot or boiling water. Do not use cold water, as this will cause the beans to turn dark; similarly, without a lid, the beans may also darken.
6. Continue cooking until the skins are nearly as tender as the inside of the beans and the beans are intact.
7. Add salt and allow to stand before serving.
